description_long: This is a stone-textured top hat with a wide, flat brim and a cylindrical crown, both heavily marbled in shades of gray and off-white. The surface is marked with numerous dark red stains and splatters, giving it a weathered and macabre appearance. The brim is broad and circular, with irregular coloration and visible streaks and blotches. The crown is relatively tall and slightly uneven, with a flat top and rough, chiseled sides. The overall finish is matte and rough, resembling carved stone or concrete. There are no visible decorative elements, bands, or insignia on the hat.
description: A stone-like, blood-stained top hat with a wide, flat brim and a rough, marbled surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cylindrical crown with a flat top and prominent red stains on both the crown and brim.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the uneven, chiseled texture of the crown and more splattered stains across the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the marbled pattern and additional red blotches on the back of the crown and brim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the slanted, irregular crown and extensive staining on the brim's surface.
